title: lonchocarpus rugosus
intro: Lonchocarpus rugosus, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus rugosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiviral agent. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
